title: 2022 Press Releases
summary: This is a chronological index/listing page of all Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2022, containing approximately 50+ separate announcements spanning monetary policy (FOMC minutes, discount rate actions), banking applications, enforcement actions, regulatory guidance, climate risk initiatives, and infrastructure updates. It is not a single archiveable document but rather a navigation index. As a listing page, it should not be archived as a standalone research record.
key_points: This is a listing page containing links to ~50+ separate 2022 Fed press releases, not a single cohesive document
Monetary policy-related items include: FOMC minutes (November 1-2, July 26-27, September 20-21) and discount rate actions
Regulatory items include: LIBOR/SOFR transition final rule, resolution plan reviews, climate scenario analysis pilot, debit card transaction rule updates
Banking applications: multiple approval announcements for various bank holding companies
Enforcement actions: terminations and new actions against various institutions including Deutsche Bank, HSBC, Agricultural Bank of China
Fed infrastructure: FedNow Service timing updated to mid-2023, new payment services pricing announced
why_it_matters: This index page itself is not actionable for research. Individual press releases from this index may contain macro-catalyst-relevant content (FOMC minutes, rate decisions, economic data), but those must be accessed as separate source documents. This listing page serves only as a navigation aid, not a research artifact.
macro_context: The index references FOMC minutes and discount rate actions which are macro-catalyst-relevant, but the actual content of those documents is not present in this listing page. Separate archival records should be created for each individual FOMC minutes release.
market_structure_context: Market-structure-relevant items referenced include: FedNow Service update (payment infrastructure), LIBOR to SOFR transition final rule, intraday credit policy updates, and master account transparency proposal.

issues_found: SOURCE_TYPE is listing_page - per CORE RULE #5, listing pages must be rejected
Source is a navigation index, not an article-like document with actionable research content
event_type set to 'unknown' is appropriate since no single event applies to an index page
No extractable forward guidance, rate decisions, economic data prints, or substantive commentary present
The generated record correctly identifies this as a non-archivable listing page and recommends declining to archive
Historical record (2022) adds to staleness concern for real-time market analysis

notes: Non-archivable listing page. Contains an index of ~50+ Fed press releases from 2022. Topics span monetary policy, banking applications, enforcement, regulatory guidance, and payment infrastructure. Does not contain the actual content of any individual press release. This record should be used only to identify relevant discrete source documents for separate archival. The referenced FOMC minutes (Nov 1-2, Jul 26-27, Sep 20-21, 2022) and discount rate actions represent macro-catalyst opportunities if archived individually. Historical record (2022 data) - substantially stale for real-time market analysis purposes.
